tools.name: autosearch_run_research
tools.description: Launch an AI scientific research run. Returns run_id immediately. Use get_run_status to poll.

tools.name: autosearch_get_run_status
tools.description: Get the current status of a research run. Returns status, frontier_score, n_experiments, summary.

tools.name: autosearch_get_run_paper
tools.description: Get the generated paper for a completed run. Returns markdown, JSON metadata, or PDF download URL.

tools.name: autosearch_verify_doi
tools.description: Verify a DOI via Crossref. Returns validity, title, authors, year, journal.

tools.name: autosearch_search_evidence
tools.description: Search peer-reviewed evidence across academic sources without launching a full research run. Returns top N papers with metadata.

tools.name: autosearch_list_my_runs
tools.description: List the authenticated user latest research runs with status and frontier score.
